nodes.name: WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives incoming webhooks from WhatsApp Cloud API. GET handles verification challenges; POST processes inbound messages. Responds 200 to everything (lastNode mode sends last node output as response).

nodes.name: Message Parser
nodes.notes: Normalizes incoming WhatsApp payload into a standard format. Handles both GET verification and POST message processing. Extracts phone, message_type, message_body, media_id, is_media, timestamp from WhatsApp Cloud API format.

nodes.name: Session Manager
nodes.notes: Loads or creates session from n8n Data Store. Key format: session:{phone}. Creates new session with state=START if not found. Deletes expired sessions (>30min) and re-creates. TTL: 1800s.

nodes.name: State Router
nodes.notes: Routes messages by session.state. Output 0=START, 1=WAIT_PHONE, 2=WAIT_NAME, 3=WAIT_EMAIL, 4=WAIT_CONFIRMATION, 5=SEARCH_PARTICIPANT, 6=default (error/unknown state). Uses Switch node for visual branching — not code if/else.

nodes.name: Welcome Handler
nodes.notes: Handles START state: sends welcome message, transitions session state to WAIT_PHONE, resets retry_count. Routes to Session Update after processing.

nodes.name: Phone Validator
nodes.notes: Strips non-numeric chars from input, validates exactly 10 digits (Colombia), normalizes with +57 prefix. Two outputs: output 0=valid (routes to Search Participant), output 1=invalid (routes to Session Update for error reply). COUNTRY_CODE and PHONE_DIGITS configurable via env vars.

nodes.name: Search Participant
nodes.notes: Sends GET to Superlikers API to search for participant by phone. URL: {SUPERLIKERS_BASE_URL}/campaigns/{SUPERLIKERS_CAMPAIGN}/participants/search?phone={phone}. Auth via X-API-Key header. Retries 3 times with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s). Includes full response (body + statusCode) for downstream routing.

nodes.name: Participant Exists
nodes.notes: Branches on HTTP response status from Search Participant. Output 0=200 (found → store participant data, state=WAIT_TICKET). Output 1=404 (not found → state=WAIT_NAME, ask for name). Output 2=fallback (error handling for 4xx/5xx/timeout).

nodes.name: Session Update
nodes.notes: Applies partial updates to session based on the current action: phone validation result, participant search result (200=found/404=not found/error), or welcome transition. Resets retry_count on state change. Persists to Data Store with TTL 1800.

nodes.name: Message Builder
nodes.notes: Builds the WhatsApp message payload based on session state and context. Handles: GET verification (returns challenge), status updates (returns 'ok'), handler replyMessage, state-based auto-replies, and error messages. Output format: { to, type, text: { body } }.
